questions.question: 1. The two wavelengths reported in the pulse oximeter measurements:
2. From the simulator window, identify the function of the sensor probe in the pulse oximeter.

answers.a: Measure blood oxygenation through transmitted light
answers.b: Measure the intensity of light transmitted through the finger tissue
answers.c: Differentiate between oxygenated and deoxygenated hemoglobin
answers.d: Measures oxygen saturation (SpO2) and pulse rate

questions.question: 3. The first step of measuring SPO2 using pulse oximeter is:

answers.c: Clip the oximeter to the finger
